intent: web performance metrics and latency, not HR feedback

vectorQueries: how to review web performance and latency issues
performance analysis focused on response times and rendering
target.hyde: A web performance review focuses on latency, rendering cost, caching, and runtime bottlenecks. Relevant documentation should prioritize metrics, slow requests, browser performance, and system tuning rather than employee feedback or HR review processes.

intent: API refresh token rotation and revocation

vectorQueries: how refresh token rotation policies work in APIs
rotation and revocation policy for authentication tokens
target.hyde: A token rotation policy for APIs usually means issuing a new refresh token on each use, revoking the previous token, and detecting replay attempts. The most relevant docs connect refresh endpoints, token lifetime, and revocation semantics.
